category_sources: source_facts.description describes rustcat as a modern port listener and reverse shell.
source_facts.homepage points to the official rustcat GitHub repository.
display_name_sources: Official repository title uses Rustcat/rustcat branding.
docs_sources: Official repository README is the best available official documentation surface.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is already populated with https://github.com/robiot/rustcat, so repo is returned as null per instructions.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies port listener and reverse shell functionality.
source_facts.executables lists rcat as the command-line executable.
